---
title: Introduction to Databases and Information Systems
description: |
  **Delivery mode:** Online (distance learning) 
  
  **Start date:** Years 1, 2 and 3 | Term 2 - Block 4
  
  **Credits:** 10 
site-url: https://www.drps.ed.ac.uk/current/dpt/cxhein11048.htm
image: uoe.jpg
#image-alt: |
categories: [code, data, context]
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
# will inherit title, description, image
# to change ANYTHING about card, need to fill in EVERYTHING below
#  title: |
#  description: |
#  image: |
#  image-alt: |
#  defaults to 500 x 500 summary: uncomment lines below for large card
#  image-width: 600 
#  image-height: 314
#  card-style: summary_large_image 
#  image-width: 500
#  image-height: 500
#  card-style: summary
draft: false
---
::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::

## About this course

Explore how databases and information systems help manage health and social care data. This course teaches you how to query remote databases using the SQL language. Plenty of hands-on practice.
 
## Assessment
 
Poster about information systems. Data-oriented report.

## Programming

SQL, R.
